instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow reverse gear engagement only when the vehicle is stationary.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit reverse gear engagement when Vehicle_Speed equals zero.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed = 0 THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > 0 THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > 0 AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow reverse engagement only when the brake pedal is pressed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable reverse gear engagement when Brake_Pedal_Status equals Pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when the vehicle is moving forward.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse engagement when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Reverse_Safe_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Reverse_Safe_Speed THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Reverse_Safe_Speed THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Reverse_Safe_Speed AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement during ECU startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit reverse gear engagement when TCU_State equals Startup.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Normal_Operation THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF TCU_State = Startup AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF TCU_State = Initialization THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when engine is not running.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse engagement when Engine_Running_Status equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Status_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when the gear actuator is not ready.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable reverse engagement when Shift_Actuator_Status equals Not_Ready.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Ready THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Fault THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement during CAN communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit reverse engagement when CAN_Communication_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = FALSE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Communication_Status = Lost THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when transmission oil temperature is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable reverse engagement when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Trigger_Thermal_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow reverse engagement only when current gear equals neutral.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit reverse engagement when Gear_Position equals Neutral.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Gear_Position != Neutral THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Gear_Position != Neutral AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Gear_Position != Neutral THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when throttle demand is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse engagement when Throttle_Position exceeds Throttle_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Throttle_Position <= Throttle_Limit THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Throttle_Position > Critical_Throttle THEN Trigger_Safety_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when engine speed exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse engagement when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed <= Max_RPM THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Trigger_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse engagement when clutch pressure is insufficient.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit reverse engagement when Clutch_Pressure falls below Pressure_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure < Pressure_Limit THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Clutch_Pressure >= Pressure_Limit THEN Reverse_Engagement = Enabled
IF Clutch_Pressure < Pressure_Limit AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Clutch_Pressure_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reverse_Engagement = Disabled
IF Clutch_Pressure < Critical_Pressure THEN Trigger_Fault_Code
